insights.title: Forecast ↑ — Expect App Total Revenue to rebound next period — App Total New Subs +4.5%, led by YMK.
insights.body: App Total New Subs +4.5% runs far above its upstream (App Total New User -4.8%, App Total Install -21.3%; Δ +17.6pp) — the trial cohort is larger than acquisition alone implies. With the 7-day trial lag, expect App Total Revenue to rise next period. App Total Revenue is currently -1.0%, so this points to a rebound, not continued weakness. The lift is concentrated in YMK (+17.5%); YCP is -4.8%.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue is tracking its subs signal as expected.
insights.body: App Total Revenue 07-13 vs 07-06 = -4.1% tracks its 7-day driver App Total New Subs 07-06 vs 06-29 = -9.5% — revenue is following the subs signal as expected.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YMK surging (+17.5% vs upstream -5.2%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YMK +17.5% vs upstream -5.2% (conversion surging); All App +4.5% vs upstream -13.0% (conversion surging). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: Broad-based — App Total Install down across every app — broad-based, look for a platform-wide cause.
insights.body: App Total Install is down across every app (All App -21.3%, YMK -6.6%, YCP -8.4%) — a broad move, so look for a platform-wide cause, not an app-specific one.
